'''âv-v-s-m''' ('''kavavsemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photocoagulate|photocoagulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photocoagulate|photocoagulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-v-s-m
|-
! Lemma
| kavavsemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivavsemoko|thivavsemoko]] || [[word:jivavsemoko|jivavsemoko]] || [[word:shivavsemoko|shivavsemoko]] || [[word:kivavsemoko|kivavsemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvavsemoko|thuthuvavsemoko]] || [[word:jujuvavsemoko|jujuvavsemoko]] || [[word:shushuvavsemoko|shushuvavsemoko]] || [[word:kukuvavsemoko|kukuvavsemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvavsemoko|thuvavsemoko]] || [[word:juvavsemoko|juvavsemoko]] || [[word:shuvavsemoko|shuvavsemoko]] || [[word:kuvavsemoko|kuvavsemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvavsemoko|thuvavsemoko]] || [[word:juvavsemoko|juvavsemoko]] || [[word:shuvavsemoko|shuvavsemoko]] || [[word:kuvavsemoko|kuvavsemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevavsemoko|thevavsemoko]] || [[word:jevavsemoko|jevavsemoko]] || [[word:shevavsemoko|shevavsemoko]] || [[word:kevavsemoko|kevavsemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovavsemoko|thothovavsemoko]] || [[word:jojovavsemoko|jojovavsemoko]] || [[word:shoshovavsemoko|shoshovavsemoko]] || [[word:kokovavsemoko|kokovavsemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovavsemoko|thovavsemoko]] || [[word:jovavsemoko|jovavsemoko]] || [[word:shovavsemoko|shovavsemoko]] || [[word:kovavsemoko|kovavsemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovavsemoko|thovavsemoko]] || [[word:jovavsemoko|jovavsemoko]] || [[word:shovavsemoko|shovavsemoko]] || [[word:kovavsemoko|kovavsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvavsemoko|thĂŠvavsemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvavsemoko|jĂŠvavsemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvavsemoko|shĂŠvavsemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvavsemoko|kĂŠvavsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavavsemoko|thathavavsemoko]] || [[word:jajavavsemoko|jajavavsemoko]] || [[word:shashavavsemoko|shashavavsemoko]] || [[word:kakavavsemoko|kakavavsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavavsemoko|thavavsemoko]] || [[word:javavsemoko|javavsemoko]] || [[word:shavavsemoko|shavavsemoko]] || [[word:kavavsemoko|kavavsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavavsemoko|thavavsemoko]] || [[word:javavsemoko|javavsemoko]] || [[word:shavavsemoko|shavavsemoko]] || [[word:kavavsemoko|kavavsemoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
